column1: The county governor and the deputy county governor are the chief executive and deputy chief
column3:  A governor, elected directly by the people

column1: executive of the county, respectively. Each county is run by an executive committee,

column3:  A deputy, elected as running mate of the successful candidate for governorship
 A number of committee members not exceeding a third (or ten where a county
assembly has more than 30 members) of the members of the respective county
 A county secretary, nominated by the governor and approved by the county assembly,
who will double up as head of the county public service, and secretary to the county
